query_summary.intent: Temporal decay problem in compounding wiki — как wiki решает устаревание знаний
query_summary.insight: LLM Wiki Pattern compounds knowledge BUT requires maintenance — temporal decay is a structural weakness unless periodic lint catches outdated pages
